

API Reference

Complete reference for all exported symbols in KWave.jl, organized by category.

CategoryContents
Solverskspace_first_order, axisymmetric, CW, elastic, thermal solvers
GridKWaveGrid, make_time!, wavenumber helpers
MediumKWaveMedium, ElasticMedium, ThermalMedium
Source & SensorKWaveSource, KWaveSensor, SimulationOutput, SourceMode
Signal Processingtone_burst, gaussian_pulse, smooth, filter_time_series, spect
Geometrymake_disc, make_ball, Cartesian point sets
ArraysKWaveArray, element types, get_array_binary_mask
TransducerKWaveTransducer, source/sensor helpers
Reconstructionkspace_line_recon, beamform_delay_and_sum
Visualizationvoxel_plot, max_intensity_projection, display/movie
Utilitiescart2grid, db2neper, water_sound_speed, PML helpers
I/OHDF5 read/write for k-Wave C++ binary compatibility
Reference SolutionsAnalytical solutions for validation
Python Interoppython_kwave_grid, bridge to Python k-Wave
« GallerySolvers »
